weekly.label: Weekly focus
weekly.title: Quiet controls, open doors
weekly.summary: The map and console can now recede until summoned. The machine keeps its handles, but the page gets its air back.
weekly.why: A useful instrument should know when to speak and when to wait.

monday.label: Monday focus
monday.title: A ring of handles
monday.summary: Each operator is a small door: a way to enter, bind, probe, act, reflect, or surface.

tuesday.label: Tuesday focus
tuesday.title: Line-break weather
tuesday.summary: Text gathers pressure, spills across widths, and reveals the small climate inside a paragraph.

wednesday.label: Wednesday focus

thursday.label: Thursday focus

friday.label: Friday focus
friday.title: Signal register
friday.summary: A few warm routes gather near the surface: one for the week, one for the day, and a handful of useful handles.

saturday.label: Saturday focus

sunday.summary: The first room keeps the current threads close enough to find again.
